description: Canonical Python tool registry for master-control workflows. Scripts listed under active are the supported tools. Legacy candidates should not be deleted until their behavior is replaced and verified.

active.purpose: Discovery, matching, collision reporting, and safe injection planning for entries.
Organize already-numbered entry folders by 0000_Name01.json handles.
Renumber weapons now and accessories/bosses later from ordered text lists. Bottom line equals 0001_.
Generic category order sync for existing canonical text lists.
Weapon-specific legacy sync. Keep until renumber_category_from_order_list fully replaces it.

legacyCandidates.reason: Likely superseded by organize_by_handle.py and renumber_category_from_order_list.py, but must be inspected before deletion.

checkpointPolicy.purpose: Each long-running entry tool writes its latest category, key, sourceId, handle, file path, and completion status so future runs can resume without scanning/remaking every JSON entry.
